inputs.label: Invoice Value
inputs.businessContext: The value of goods as stated on the commercial invoice.

businessContext_i18n.en: The value of goods as stated on the commercial invoice.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur des marchandises indiquée sur la facture commerciale.
businessContext_i18n.es: El valor de los bienes según la factura comercial.
businessContext_i18n.ar: قيمة البضائع كما هو مذكور في الفاتورة التجارية.

inputs.label: Insurance Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of insuring the shipment during transit.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of insuring the shipment during transit.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten der Transportversicherung während des Transports.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût de l'assurance du transport pendant le transit.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste de asegurar el envío durante el tránsito.

inputs.label: Freight Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of transporting the goods to the destination port.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of transporting the goods to the destination port.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten für den Transport der Waren zum Zielhafen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût du transport des marchandises jusqu'au port de destination.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste de transportar los bienes al puerto de destino.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تكلفة نقل البضائع إلى ميناء الوجهة.

inputs.label: Duty Rate
inputs.businessContext: Ad valorem customs duty rate for the imported goods.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ad valorem customs duty rate for the imported goods.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İthal edilen mallar için ad valorem gümrük vergisi oranı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de droit de douane ad valorem pour les marchandises importées.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de arancel aduanero ad valorem para los bienes importados.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة الرسوم الجمركية حسب القيمة للبضائع المستوردة.

inputs.label: VAT Rate
inputs.businessContext: Value Added Tax rate applied to the tax base.

businessContext_i18n.en: Value Added Tax rate applied to the tax base.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vergi matrahına uygulanan katma değer vergisi oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Mehrwertsteuersatz, der auf die Bemessungsgrundlage angewendet wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de taxe sur la valeur ajoutée appliqué à la base imposable.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa del impuesto al valor añadido aplicada a la base imponible.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة ضريبة القيمة المضافة المطبقة على الوعاء الضريبي.

inputs.label: Additional Fees
inputs.businessContext: Other costs such as customs brokering or terminal handling charges.

businessContext_i18n.en: Other costs such as customs brokering or terminal handling charges.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gümrük müşavirliği veya terminal işlem ücretleri gibi diğer maliyetler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Sonstige Kosten wie Zollabfertigung oder Terminalabfertigungsgebühren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Autres coûts tels que les frais de courtage en douane ou de manutention terminale.
businessContext_i18n.es: Otros costes como gestión aduanera o manipulación en terminal.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تكاليف أخرى مثل الوساطة الجمركية أو رسوم المناولة في المحطة.
